params_frozen.design_provenance: Built after v7 (Lasso, αt +2.60 mean, sign-flip ALL phases, FAIL) and v8 (model-free −ivp30, αt +2.18 mean, FAIL) on burnt 2024-04-30 → 2026-04-30 holdout. v7's L/S diagnostic αt = −3.25 (from final canonical run, 1626 universe) implied bottom-decile (LOW-IV per Xing) long-only αt ≈ +5.34 if direction had been correct. v9 thesis: combine v7's equity-control + IV/HV-ratio amplification with v8's mechanically-enforced Xing-direction by sign-constraining the 4 options-feature coefficients to ≤ 0 while leaving the 3 equity controls free-sign.
params_frozen.adversarial_review_summary: Perplexity Sonar Reasoning Pro (2026-05-03) ranked v9 redesign axes by likelihood × HARKing risk × Bonferroni cost. Option A (sign-constrained Lasso) ranked #1 at ~25-35% chance of clearing |t|≥3.13. Option D (cross-sectional residualization) ranked #2 at ~20-30%, pre-committed as SECONDARY to be run only if A FAILs. Realistic ceiling per perplexity: ~+2.5-2.9 αt (underlying signal triangulated at ~+2.2 from v7+v8). Likely FAIL outcome documented as honest expectation. Burnt-holdout policy held — same window, prospective replication is the only escape.
params_frozen.model_class: Sign-constrained Lasso (LassoCV with positive=True on augmented feature matrix)
params_frozen.model_construction: Standardize ORIGINAL features → mean μ, std σ, X_std (n × 7). Build augmented matrix X_aug (n × 10): negated options (4 cols) + equity-positive (3 cols) + equity-negative (3 cols). Fit LassoCV(positive=True, eps=1e-6, n_alphas=25, cv=3). Map back to original-feature standardized space: coef_options = -β_aug[options_neg], coef_equity = β_aug[equity_pos] - β_aug[equity_neg]. Net: coef_options ≤ 0 mechanically, coef_equity free-sign.
feature_stack_equity_controls: rv_30d — annualized stdev log returns last 30 days (free-sign)

universe_construction.optionable_filter: smd `optVol > 0 OR (oi_call + oi_put) > 0` on t-1 (same as v7/v8)

delisting_handling.rule: −50% standard / −100% bankruptcy at terminal bar (same as v7/v8)

params_frozen.fit_strategy: Single global sign-constrained Lasso fitted on 7-feature stack across train tranches 2018-04-30 → 2024-04-29
params_frozen.selection_primary: long-only TOP decile EW by sign-constrained Lasso prediction. With coef_options ≤ 0, top-decile = LOW-IV names (Xing-correct), amplified by equity-control signal where present.
params_frozen.selection_diagnostic_secondary: L/S decile spread (top − bottom) reported alongside primary. NOT primary verdict, NOT additional Bonferroni test.

phase_audit.dispersion_metric_legacy: excess_net_ann (kept for descriptive comparison with v7+v8; KNOWN to be 1d-fwd × 50.4 magnification-prone)
phase_audit.amendment_rationale: v7+v8 audit revealed annualized excess-range gate (50pp) is mechanically inflated by 1d-fwd × 50.4 annualization. v9 pre-reg amends primary dispersion gate to per-rebal alpha_t-range ≤ 0.5 (which v7's 1.30 still FAILs and v8's 0.42 PASSes — gate is informative, not loosened). Both metrics reported in verdict; primary is alpha_t_range.

phase_a_gates.multicollinearity_action: drop more-derived feature per pre-committed hierarchy (same as v7)

periods.rationale: Same train + burnt holdout as v7/v8. Window-shopping = HARKing per perplexity verdict.

secondary_pre_committed.name: v9_cross_sectional_residual_options_implied_2026_05_03
secondary_pre_committed.framing: PRE-COMMITTED SECONDARY, run ONLY IF primary (sign-constrained Lasso) FAILs
secondary_pre_committed.description: Cross-sectional OLS within each asof: −ivp30 ~ reversal_1m + momentum_6m + rv_30d + intercept. Score = OLS residual (orthogonalized −ivp30 signal). Long top-decile EW by residual. Deterministic — no time-series fit, no parameter drift. Independent test from option A.
secondary_pre_committed.execution_rule: Pre-reg JSON encodes the conditional. A must complete and FAIL before D runs. NO mid-run inspection of A to decide on D.

success_criteria.primary_metric: Carhart-4F alpha t-stat (HAC=5) on (long-only-top-decile-by-sign-constrained-Lasso − MDY-return) holdout series
success_criteria.bonferroni_threshold_naive_program_level: n=17 → |αt| ≥ 3.13 (one-up from v8 n=16, +1 amendment for sign constraint per perplexity guidance)
success_criteria.primary_pass_rule: Holdout single-phase αt ≥ 3.13 AND multi-phase mean(αt) ≥ 3.13 AND alpha_t_range across 5 phases ≤ 0.5 AND ivp30 coverage ≥ 70% AND ≥1 nonzero coef on options features (selection-mechanism gate)
success_criteria.fail_rule: any primary gate misses → run pre-committed SECONDARY (cross-sectional residualization) per pre-reg conditional, threshold tightens to n=18 |t|≥3.20

verdict_classification.primary_pass: PRIMARY (A) clears all gates → advance to prospective replication 2026-05-03+
verdict_classification.primary_fail_secondary_pass: SECONDARY (D) clears its tightened gates → exploratory PASS, advance to prospective replication; report A's failure mode as diagnostic context
verdict_classification.both_fail: options_implied class CLOSED on burnt holdout. Pivot to fresh class OR wait for prospective replication (existing v8_xing_frozen track)

auto_pivot_triggers: ALL 4 options coefs zeroed by sign-constrained fit → FAIL (selection-mechanism artifact, mirrors v2 alt_data degenerate case)
alpha_t_range >0.5 across phases → FAIL (regime fragility per amended gate)
success_criteria.no_stretch_tier: v7's Romano-Wolf stretch flag (m=30) dropped — single PASS bar, same as v8.
success_criteria.regime_stratification_postdoc: DESCRIPTIVE: report holdout αt and excess vs MDY split by VIX>20 vs VIX<20 sub-periods. Not a gate.
success_criteria.capital_deploy_clause: Capital deploy OFF-TABLE on this burnt holdout regardless of any verdict per program-level burnt-holdout policy. PASS triggers prospective walk-forward replication on data accruing post-2026-04-30 at unadjusted p<0.05 single-test before any escalation.
